note: Important: Ensure phone is on the same Wi-Fi network for Wireless Debugging.

steps.title: System Preparation
steps.desc: Enable Developer Options (tap 'Build Number' 7x). Enable 'Wireless Debugging' in Developer Options.

steps.title: Pairing Process
steps.desc: Wireless Debugging > Pair device with pairing code. Enter the 6-digit code into the Stellar notification.

steps.title: Scanning Gacha Link
steps.desc: Once 'Paired', click CONNECT, then SCAN. Open in-game wish history (Genshin/HSR/ZZZ), then return to Stellar.

steps.title: Import Data
steps.desc: Copy the scan result link, go to Wish Counter, select game, paste the link, and press IMPORT DATA.

steps.title: Import Local File
steps.desc: You can upload local files to import old data (>6 months) and merge it with new data.
